songs.title: The Black Dog

feed: “The Black Dog” by Taylor Swift reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.

“The Black Dog” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 120 streams units.
